dealSummary: Project Prometheus, an AI lab co-founded by Jeff Bezos, is in talks to raise a $10 billion round at a $38 billion valuation, the Financial Times reported.

India-based Sarvam is in talks to raise $320 million to $350 million in a round from investors including Nvidia, Amazon and HCLTech that would value the AI startup at around $1.5 billion, The Economic Times reported.
leadInvestors: Nvidia, Amazon, HCLTech that would value the AI startup at around $1

dealSummary: Collov Labs, a visual AI startup, secured a $23 million Series A from investors including Brightway Future Capital, Taihill Venture and Mindworks Capital.
leadInvestors: Brightway Future Capital, Taihill Venture, Mindworks Capital

dealSummary: Dutch quantum chip testing startup Orange Quantum Systems received €3 million at the second close of its seed round from investors including the European Innovation Council Fund, bringing the total for the round to €15 million.
VisioLab, the German developer of an AI self-checkout system, raised an $11 million Series A led by eCapital Entrepreneurial Partners and Simon Capital.
Smart Robotics, a Netherlands-based company focused on intralogistics automation, secured €10 million Series A led by Rotterdamse Havendraken.
